mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservations (reservation_code, user_id, order_id, canteen_id, time_slot_id, seat_id, reservation_status) VALUES (#{reservationCode}, #{userId}, #{orderId}, #{canteenId}, #{timeSlotId}, #{seatId}, #{reservationStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reservations WHERE time_slot_id = #{timeSlotId} AND seat_id = #{seatId} AND reservation_status = 'RESERVED'
